name: Spirit Realty Capital Inc. 6.000% Series A Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock
summary: Spirit Realty Capital, Inc. is a real estate investment trust (REIT) that invests in single-tenant, net-lease properties. The 6.000% Series A Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock represents a specific class of ownership with associated dividend rights. Spirit Realty Capital is headquartered in Scottsdale, Arizona.
